Дата: 2026-04-29

----
title: "03-integral-final"
tags:
  * anthropic-vacancies
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. 03-integral-final

_Файлов:_ 5

h2. Содержание

* [[01-three-archetypes|01-three-archetypes.md]] —
